input: Run signal detection for simvastatin and rhabdomyolysis. This is a well-known labeled safety signal. Compute disproportionality measures and Safety Signal Score.

expected_details.mechanism: HMG-CoA reductase inhibition disrupts muscle cell cholesterol synthesis and mitochondrial function

input: Run signal detection for levofloxacin and tendon rupture. This is a known boxed warning signal. Compute all disproportionality measures.

expected_details.mechanism: fluoroquinolone-mediated collagen degradation via MMP upregulation; oxidative tendon damage

input: Run signal detection for lisinopril and angioedema.

expected_details.mechanism: ACE inhibition causes bradykinin accumulation leading to vasodilation and tissue edema
expected_details.demographic_pattern: higher risk in African American patients

input: Run signal detection for ibuprofen and gastrointestinal hemorrhage.

expected_details.mechanism: COX-1 inhibition reduces protective prostaglandin synthesis in gastric mucosa

input: Run signal detection for metformin and lactic acidosis. Note: this is a labeled but rare and debated signal.

expected_details.mechanism: metformin inhibits mitochondrial complex I and hepatic lactate uptake; risk primarily in renal impairment
expected_details.nuance: boxed warning present but causal association debated; risk primarily in contraindicated populations

input: Run signal detection for sertraline and hyponatremia (SIADH).

expected_details.mechanism: SSRI-induced SIADH via serotonergic stimulation of ADH release

input: Run signal detection for aspirin and alopecia. This is expected to be a NEGATIVE control — no meaningful safety signal expected.
Run signal detection for nivolumab and myocarditis. This is a rare but serious immune-related adverse event.

expected_details.mechanism: T-cell-mediated autoimmune attack on cardiac myocytes following PD-1 checkpoint release

input: Run signal detection for tofacitinib and venous thromboembolism (VTE including PE and DVT). Reference: ORAL Surveillance trial.

expected_details.mechanism: JAK2 inhibition may impair endothelial protective signaling and hemostatic balance

input: Run signal detection for semaglutide and thyroid cancer (medullary thyroid carcinoma). Note: boxed warning based on rodent data; human signal strength is debated.

expected_details.mechanism: GLP-1R activation stimulates calcitonin release and C-cell proliferation in rodents; uncertain relevance in humans
expected_details.nuance: rodent signal strong; human epidemiologic evidence conflicting; precautionary labeling
